headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's Hormuz gambit lands with a whimper
summary: Markets appear to have made their peace with the stalled talks, with oil barely moving despite another oil output quota hike by the OPEC+ members.

headline: Dow falls 400 points as oil jumps on fear Iran conflict set to flare up again: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are coming off of a solid week, having notched fresh records on Friday.
